headline: Diamondback (FANG) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Kaes Van't Hof: Yes, Neil, I'll give you some high-level thoughts and then turn it over to Al, but it's a pretty exciting reveal of our position in the Barnett.  But overall, I think the oil productivity speaks for itself and is very competitive once we get the returns where we see them going.
